title: GemOfPower (remake)
description: A gem with special abilities, official remake !
body:
# GemOfPowers Remake

A Minecraft plugin that adds gems with unique powers to the game. Each gem can be used and has various effects.

## Features

- **5 types of gems** with unique powers
- **Cooldown system** for each gem
- **Custom texture support** via CustomModelData
- **Admin commands** to manage gems
- **Compatibility** with Minecraft 1.21+ versions

## Gem Types

**Water :**
- Applies Mining Fatigue I and Weakness II to enemies
- Cooldown : 10s
- Dropped from : Elder Guardian, 4% chance

**Fire :**
- Launches a fireball and give Fire Resistance
- Cooldown : 15s
- Dropped from : Blaze, 2% chance

**Void :**
- Make enemies levitate
- Cooldown : 10s
- Dropped from : enderman, 2% chance

**Chaos :**
- Give Strengh I to the player, and Poison I to nearby enemies
- Cooldown : 14s
- Dropped from : Vindicator, 2% chance

**Depression :**
- Regeneration III to the player, and Poison IV to enemies
- Cooldown : 13s
- Dropped from : Sheep (don't ask why), with 0.3% chance

## Commands

### Basic Commands
- `/gem info` - Shows information about the gems
- `/gem give <player> <type>` - Gives a gem to a player
- `/gem giveall <player>` - Gives all gems to a player

### CustomModelData Commands (OP only)
- `/gem setcustommodeldata <type> <id>` - Sets a custom model for a gem type
- `/gem givewithcustommodeldata <player> <type> <id>` - Gives a gem with a specific custom model

## How to Use Gems

1. Obtain a gem by killing the corresponding mobs or using admin commands
2. Right-click while holding the gem to activate its power
3. Each gem has a cooldown period before it can be used again

## Texture Customization (Resource Pack)

To add custom textures to the gems:

1. Create a resource pack
2. Add your custom models with unique model numbers
3. Use the command `/gem setcustommodeldata <type> <id>` to link a model to a gem
4. All new gems of that type will automatically use this model

## Permissions

- `gem.use` - Allows using gems (default: true)
- `gem.admin` - Access to all admin commands (default: op)
- `gem.setmodel` - Allows modifying gem models (default: op)
- `gem.givecustom` - Allows giving gems with custom models (default: op)

## Configuration

The configuration file is automatically generated at `plugins/GemOfPowersRemake/config.yml`. You can modify:

- Effect durations
- Effect radii
- Cooldown times
- Custom models

## Support

To report a bug or suggest a feature, please open an issue on our **Discord !**
Discord : https://discord.gg/YpdZBux6x7

Developed by TheWayshOK
